reasoning: Koren, to tackle your lactate clearance limiter, we're focusing on over-under intervals. Your last ride emphasized aerobic capacity but lacked the intensity to enhance your lactate threshold. This workout mimics the demands of the Alpine Loop's main climb and aims to build your ability to handle sustained efforts with varying intensity.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 5 sets of 6-minute over-under intervals: 2 minutes at 201-218W, 2 minutes at 242-256W, repeat. 2-minute recovery between sets at 60% FTP.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
